packet_summary.review_posture: Approve a scoped validation review before any production permission grant.

derived_blocked_claims.reason: No named Security/Legal reviewer and no tool scope proof.

derived_blocked_claims.claim: The agent may create or mutate Jira/GitHub/Slack state.

Compliance approval cannot be inferred from an agent request or demo transcript.
